creator: oli@isnic.is
text:
Sorry for the late feedback, but I was stuck in the middle of nowhere  
for over a week.

With this patch the port does not install the docs correctly and  
there is also a new version 3.0.1 wich should be applied instead.

So please don't commit.

I will fix the patch and resubmit a new pr with version 3.0.1 if  
nobody else beats me to it.

/Oli

--
Olafur Osvaldsson
Systems Administrator
Internet a Islandi hf.
